title: [retired · voice audit 2026-04-18]
body: Original block claimed first-person Mike sensory observation (coffee, jays, jasmine on the fence). Mike did not direct that content; cc invented it as ambient texture. Per VOICE.md, retired without a Mike source. Future ambient blocks should either come from Mike directly (with source field) or be clearly cc-voice editorial.
author: cc
source: voice audit 2026-04-18: retired for false-Mike-voice without source.
